overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit urban plaza at night, transitioning into a landscaped garden area with other NPCs. The scene features wet reflective pavement, towering buildings with holographic advertisements, and atmospheric neon lighting in teal and magenta hues.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with palm trees and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza toward the illuminated circular tower ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking across the plaza

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building wrapped in blue and red neon lights with a circular roof
tall palm trees lining the left side of the plaza
multi-story building with illuminated windows and neon accents
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza at night, with wet reflective pavement mirroring the neon lights. A distinctive circular tower glows in the distance while palm trees line the walkway. Pedestrians move through the space as the camera walks steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: landscaped garden entrance with stairs and tree canopy

events.description: turns left and descends stairs into a tree-lined garden area from the open plaza

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking down illuminated stairs into the garden area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking up the stairs toward the plaza

entered.detail: tall trees with dense canopy creating partial cover overhead
raised planter beds with uplighting highlighting the vegetation
concrete bench along the garden pathway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the open plaza into a more enclosed garden space. The camera turns left and descends stairs lined with illuminated planters. The circular tower and palm trees recede behind as tree canopy begins to cover the sky, creating a sheltered atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden plaza with central tree and reflective water features

events.description: slows slightly while navigating around a group of NPCs gathered in the plaza center

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden plaza, approaching and passing groups of NPCs

notable_agents.action: character with green hair and beige outfit standing in the plaza center
shirtless pedestrian with red hair walking through the garden

entered.detail: large mature tree with thick trunk at the center of the garden plaza
reflective water pool or wet pavement surrounding the central tree
tall building with vertical purple neon signage reading DREAM or similar

segments.scene_description: Walking through a lush garden plaza featuring a prominent central tree surrounded by reflective water features. The area is densely vegetated with illuminated shrubs. Several NPCs populate the space, including a distinctive character with green hair. A tall building with purple vertical signage rises on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed garden walkway with benches and uplighting

events.description: passes close by the green-haired character who temporarily blocks the right side of the view
continues past seated NPCs on benches along the pathway

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the garden walkway, passing NPCs seated on benches and walking past other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two NPCs sitting on a bench conversing, one wearing a hat
NPC in blue top and gray pants walking past the camera

entered.detail: wooden and metal park bench with NPCs seated
dense shrubs with warm uplighting at their base
large illuminated screen visible at the end of the garden path

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a more enclosed garden walkway lined with illuminated bushes and benches. The camera passes NPCs seated on benches and others walking in the opposite direction. The path leads toward a distant digital screen, with the purple-signed building now receding into the background. The atmosphere is intimate and sheltered by dense vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit urban plaza into an intimate, sheltered garden sanctuary. It begins by gliding across wet, reflective pavement toward a glowing circular tower and palm trees, with pedestrians scattering through the open night air. As the camera turns left and descends a set of stairs lined with illuminated planters, the open plaza recedes and a dense tree canopy begins to enclose the sky. The scene then expands into a lush garden plaza featuring a central tree and reflective water features, passing a character with green hair beneath a towering building with purple vertical signage. Finally, the path narrows into a secluded walkway lined with glowing bushes and benches, moving past seated NPCs toward a distant digital screen as the urban architecture fades into the background.
